signin.title: Welcome to Folio
signin.description_signin: Sign in with the email you registered with.
signin.description_signup: An email and a name is all we need.

verify.title: Check your email
verify.description: We sent a verification code to {{email}}

cli.title: Authorize CLI
cli.description: Allow the CLI to access Folio as {{email}}

errors.server_unreachable: Make sure the server is running.
errors.cli_auth_failed: Failed to authorize CLI. Please log in again.
errors.no_account_for_email: No account for this email — create one to get started.
errors.email_already_registered: An account with this email already exists — sign in instead.
errors.login_failed: Couldn't sign you in. Try again or create a new account.
errors.signup_failed: Couldn't create your account. Try again.

desktop_handoff.opening_description: You should see a prompt to open the Folio desktop app. If nothing happens, click the button below.
